ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each golf course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the golf course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the golf course */,
  "number_of_holes" INTEGER /* Number of holes in the golf course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the golf course */,
  "rating" REAL /* Course rating */,
  "slope" REAL /* Course slope */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the golf course */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the golf course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holes" (
  "hole_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hole */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golf course the hole belongs to */,
  "hole_number" INTEGER /* Number of the hole (1-18) */,
  "hole_length_white" INTEGER /* Length of the hole from the white tees in yards */,
  "hole_length_yellow" INTEGER /* Length of the hole from the yellow tees in yards */,
  "hole_length_red" INTEGER /* Length of the hole from the red tees in yards */,
  "par_white" INTEGER /* Par value for the hole from the white tees */,
  "par_yellow" INTEGER /* Par value for the hole from the yellow tees */,
  "par_red" INTEGER /* Par value for the hole from the red tees */,
  "stroke_index" INTEGER /* Stroke index of the hole */,
  "hole_handicap" INTEGER /* Hole handicap */,
  "green_size" REAL /* Size of the green in square yards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hole_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holes_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tees" (
  "tee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tee position */,
  "tee_name" TEXT /* Name of the tee position (e.g., White, Yellow, Red) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tee position */,
  "men_rating" REAL /* Men's course rating from this tee position */,
  "men_slope" REAL /* Men's slope rating from this tee position */,
  "women_rating" REAL /* Women's course rating from this tee position */,
  "women_slope" REAL /* Women's slope rating from this tee position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., course manager, tournament organizer, golfer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golf course where the tournament is held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tournament */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament (e.g., stroke play, match play) */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Entry fee for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_holes" (
  "tournament_hole_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hole in a tournament */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "hole_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hole */,
  "tee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tee position used for the hole in the tournament */,
  "hole_order" INTEGER /* Order of the hole in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_hole_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_holes_tee_id FOREIGN KEY ("tee_id") REFERENCES tees ("tee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_holes_hole_id FOREIGN KEY ("hole_id") REFERENCES holes ("hole_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_holes_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "tournament_hole_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament hole */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (player) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score for the hole */,
  "date_played" TEXT /* Date when the hole was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_tournament_hole_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_hole_id") REFERENCES tournament_holes ("tournament_hole_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course configuration */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golf course */,
  "config_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was applied */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_configurations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_holes" (
  "config_hole_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hole in a course configuration */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course configuration */,
  "hole_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hole */,
  "tee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tee position used for the hole in the configuration */,
  "hole_length" INTEGER /* Length of the hole in yards */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par value for the hole */,
  "stroke_index" INTEGER /* Stroke index of the hole */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_hole_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_holes_tee_id FOREIGN KEY ("tee_id") REFERENCES tees ("tee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_holes_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES course_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_holes_hole_id FOREIGN KEY ("hole_id") REFERENCES holes ("hole_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_tournaments" (
  "user_tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-tournament pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tournaments_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tournaments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
